name: Willogoleche 2 Wind Farm
operational_notes: Expansion of operating Willogoleche 1 (119 MW commissioned Dec 2019). Same ENGIE 25% + Foresight Group 75% JV structure as Willogoleche 1. Construction to commence late 2026, commissioning 2028. $65k/yr community fund committed. AURES record reconciled 2026-07-18 as part of v3.22.4 data-gap closure — previously a stub with 'ENGIE / Foresight' and CIS 'executed' status (both inaccurate). Note: prior CIS_PROJECTS entry had project_id pointing at Stage 1 operating record — now correctly points at this Stage 2 record.

timeline.title: CIS Tender 4 award (108 MW)
timeline.detail: Awarded CIS Tender 4 — NEM Generation for 108 MW wind. Expansion of Willogoleche 1 (operating).

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: Construction expected late 2026, commissioning 2028. Same ENGIE + Foresight JV structure as operating Willogoleche 1. Pre-FID at ~9 months post-award. Prior AURES entry incorrectly marked as 'executed' — corrected 2026-07-18.

sources.title: ENGIE + Foresight media release on CIS T4 award (Oct 2025)
